description: Convert Swagger/OpenAPI JSON files to Swagger-style Markdown. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Swagger JSON to Markdown

releases.author: Krontur
releases.description:
## Swagger JSON to Markdown 1.0.2

Patch release focused on Obsidian community plugin review compliance and release packaging.

### Changed
- Updated minimum Obsidian app version to 1.4.0.
- Cleaned bundled CSS to avoid Obsidian review warnings.
- Removed unsupported/flagged print CSS properties.
- Removed `!important` usage from bundled styles.
- Added GitHub Actions release workflow support for artifact attestations.

### Verification
- Passed lint.
- Passed test suite.
- Passed production build.
releases.name: Swagger JSON to Markdown 1.0.2

releases.author: Krontur

Assets for manual installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: Swagger JSON to Markdown 1.0.1
